testcase.name: Login Tests › should login successfully with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-14 11:01:26 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing LoginPage fixture 2026-03-14 11:01:26 [[32MINFO[39M]: ========== TEST START: Login Test ========== 2026-03-14 11:01:26 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Navigating to login page 2026-03-14 11:01:26 [[32MINFO[39M]: Navigating to: / 2026-03-14 11:01:32 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing HomePage fixture 2026-03-14 11:01:32 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing UserService fixture 2026-03-14 11:01:32 [[32MINFO[39M]: User data loaded successfully 2026-03-14 11:01:32 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Logging in with username: standard_user 2026-03-14 11:01:32 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Entering username: standard_user 2026-03-14 11:01:36 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Entering password 2026-03-14 11:01:40 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Clicking login button 2026-03-14 11:01:44 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Verifying inventory page is loaded 2026-03-14 11:01:44 [[32MINFO[39M]: Element visible: true 2026-03-14 11:01:44 [[32MINFO[39M]: ========== TEST END: should login successfully with valid credentials - PASSED ========== 2026-03-14 11:01:44 [[32MINFO[39M]: UserService fixture cleanup 2026-03-14 11:01:44 [[32MINFO[39M]: HomePage fixture cleanup 2026-03-14 11:01:44 [[32MINFO[39M]: LoginPage fixture cleanup

testcase.name: Login Tests › should show error for locked out user
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-14 11:01:46 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing LoginPage fixture 2026-03-14 11:01:46 [[32MINFO[39M]: ========== TEST START: Login Test ========== 2026-03-14 11:01:46 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Navigating to login page 2026-03-14 11:01:46 [[32MINFO[39M]: Navigating to: / 2026-03-14 11:01:51 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing UserService fixture 2026-03-14 11:01:51 [[32MINFO[39M]: User data loaded successfully 2026-03-14 11:01:51 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Logging in with username: locked_out_user 2026-03-14 11:01:51 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Entering username: locked_out_user 2026-03-14 11:01:55 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Entering password 2026-03-14 11:01:59 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Clicking login button 2026-03-14 11:02:03 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Checking if error is displayed 2026-03-14 11:02:04 [[32MINFO[39M]: Element visible: true 2026-03-14 11:02:04 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Getting error message 2026-03-14 11:02:04 [[32MINFO[39M]: Retrieved text: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out. 2026-03-14 11:02:04 [[32MINFO[39M]: ========== TEST END: should show error for locked out user - PASSED ========== 2026-03-14 11:02:04 [[32MINFO[39M]: UserService fixture cleanup 2026-03-14 11:02:04 [[32MINFO[39M]: LoginPage fixture cleanup

testcase.name: Login Tests › should show error for invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-14 11:02:05 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing LoginPage fixture 2026-03-14 11:02:05 [[32MINFO[39M]: ========== TEST START: Login Test ========== 2026-03-14 11:02:05 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Navigating to login page 2026-03-14 11:02:05 [[32MINFO[39M]: Navigating to: / 2026-03-14 11:02:10 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing UserService fixture 2026-03-14 11:02:10 [[32MINFO[39M]: User data loaded successfully 2026-03-14 11:02:10 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Logging in with username: invalid_user 2026-03-14 11:02:10 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Entering username: invalid_user 2026-03-14 11:02:14 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Entering password 2026-03-14 11:02:19 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Clicking login button 2026-03-14 11:02:23 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Checking if error is displayed 2026-03-14 11:02:23 [[32MINFO[39M]: Element visible: true 2026-03-14 11:02:23 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Getting error message 2026-03-14 11:02:23 [[32MINFO[39M]: Retrieved text: Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service 2026-03-14 11:02:23 [[32MINFO[39M]: ========== TEST END: should show error for invalid credentials - PASSED ========== 2026-03-14 11:02:23 [[32MINFO[39M]: UserService fixture cleanup 2026-03-14 11:02:23 [[32MINFO[39M]: LoginPage fixture cleanup

testcase.name: Login Tests › should show error when username is empty

testcase.name: Login Tests › should be able to close error message
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-14 11:03:01 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing LoginPage fixture 2026-03-14 11:03:01 [[32MINFO[39M]: ========== TEST START: Login Test ========== 2026-03-14 11:03:01 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Navigating to login page 2026-03-14 11:03:01 [[32MINFO[39M]: Navigating to: / 2026-03-14 11:03:06 [[32MINFO[39M]: Initializing UserService fixture 2026-03-14 11:03:06 [[32MINFO[39M]: User data loaded successfully 2026-03-14 11:03:06 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Logging in with username: invalid_user 2026-03-14 11:03:06 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Entering username: invalid_user 2026-03-14 11:03:10 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Entering password 2026-03-14 11:03:14 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Clicking login button 2026-03-14 11:03:18 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Checking if error is displayed 2026-03-14 11:03:18 [[32MINFO[39M]: Element visible: true 2026-03-14 11:03:18 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Closing error message 2026-03-14 11:03:22 [[32MINFO[39M]: STEP: Checking if error is displayed 2026-03-14 11:03:22 [[32MINFO[39M]: Element visible: false 2026-03-14 11:03:22 [[32MINFO[39M]: ========== TEST END: should be able to close error message - PASSED ========== 2026-03-14 11:03:22 [[32MINFO[39M]: UserService fixture cleanup 2026-03-14 11:03:22 [[32MINFO[39M]: LoginPage fixture cleanup

testcase.name: Login Tests › should login with performance glitch user
